## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy and introduce a new AI visibility tool.](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New AI Visibility Tool:** GrowthX is replacing Scrunch with its proprietary tool, "Check That," to track Galileo's AI performance.](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
  - [**Performance Gap Explained:** Galileo's 7.2% visibility in Check That vs. 20% in Scrunch is due to different prompt sets. Check That uses a curated library of high-intent, evaluation-stage prompts, while Scrunch uses custom prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [**Strategic Fixes Required:** To make Check That data actionable for Jason, Galileo's category must be refined to "AI Evaluation & Observability," and a competitor error (wrong Braintrust logo) must be fixed.](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Pivot:** To counter a post-December traffic dip, the team will prioritize refreshing high-performing "evals" and "miscellaneous" pages, as this is the most effective lever for AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)

## Topics

### Check That: New AI Visibility Tool

  - [GrowthX is replacing Scrunch with "Check That," its proprietary tool for tracking AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
  - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
      - [Tracks performance across 5 LLM platforms (Claude, Google AI, ChatGPT, Perplexity).](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
      - [Shows exact citations (specific page URLs, not just homepages).](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
      - [Identifies top-cited pages to reveal competitor content strategies and gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
  - [**Access:** GrowthX clients receive free access for up to one year.](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)

### Performance Gap: Check That vs. Scrunch

  - [A significant gap exists between Galileo's visibility scores: 7.2% in Check That vs. 20% in Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The prompt sets differ significantly.](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
      - [**Check That:** Uses a curated library of evaluation-stage prompts (e.g., "best X for Y") that reflect high-intent buying decisions.](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
      - [**Scrunch:** Uses custom prompts provided by the client.](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
  - [**Conclusion:** The tools measure different things, making the scores non-comparable.](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)

### Refining Check That for Actionable Reporting

  - [To make Check That data actionable for Jason, the tool's setup requires refinement.](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
  - [**Category:** The current "AI Monitoring and Observability" category is too broad, grouping Galileo with general solutions like Datadog.](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
      - [**Proposed:** "AI Evaluation and Observability" to better reflect Galileo's core focus and provide a more relevant competitive comparison.](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [**Competitors:** A competitor error (wrong Braintrust logo) must be fixed to ensure accurate data.](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [**Metric for Jason:** A succinct performance metric is needed.](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**Proposal:** A weighted formula combining Position, Sentiment, and Citation Share, with relative competitor positioning (Arise, Langsmith) as a key factor.](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)

### Content Strategy & Performance

  - [**Traffic Dip:** January traffic is down, especially on "evals" and "miscellaneous" pages that were top performers mid-last year.](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [**Solution:** Prioritize refreshing these pages.](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Refreshes are the most effective lever for improving AI visibility and capitalizing on algorithm recency bias.](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [**Content Production:** On track. New content from the report will be integrated next week, with a lower priority than LLM performance topics.](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)

      - [Send Jackson the list of library and custom prompts from Check That.](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
      - [Flag the Braintrust logo error for the Check That team.](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [**Jackson:**](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
      - [Review the category list and confirm the best fit for Galileo.](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
      - [Develop a succinct performance metric for Jason using the weighted formula concept.](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
      - [Prioritize refreshing underperforming "evals" and "miscellaneous" pages.](https://fathom.video/share/7CuBerLMoc916sbLafr6ij5GLQH-ktaW?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
